from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'ZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMud2FsbGV0IGltcG9ydCBXYWxsZXQKCndhbGxldCA9IFdhbGxldCgxMCkKcHJpbnQod2FsbGV0LmRlcG9zaXQoNSkpCnByaW50KHdhbGxldC5kZXBvc2l0KC0zKSkK',
    'models/wallet.py': 'Y2xhc3MgV2FsbGV0OgogICAgZGVmIF9faW5pdF9fKHNlbGYsIGJhbGFuY2UpOgogICAgICAgIHNlbGYuYmFsYW5jZSA9IG1heCgwLCBiYWxhbmNlKQoKICAgIGRlZiBkZXBvc2l0KHNlbGYsIGFtb3VudCk6CiAgICAgICAgaWYgYW1vdW50ID4gMDoKICAgICAgICAgICAgc2VsZi5iYWxhbmNlICs9IGFtb3VudAogICAgICAgIHJldHVybiBzZWxmLmJhbGFuY2UK',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")
